hero.title: Experience Authentic Khmer Cuisine
hero.subtitle: Traditional Cambodian flavors served in a modern dining experience. Crafted with passion, fresh local organic produce, and heirloom recipes.

signatureDishes.name: Amok Trey
signatureDishes.desc: A timeless Cambodian treasure — tender river fish steamed within a banana leaf parcel, enveloped in a velvety coconut-lemongrass curry mousse, perfumed with galangal and kaffir lime.

diningSpaces.name: Family Dining
diningSpaces.desc: Spacious tables for 4-10, high chairs available, playful sharing platters designed for togetherness.

diningSpaces.name: Private Room
diningSpaces.desc: An intimate enclosed dining room for 8–20, with dedicated staff, custom menus and AV capabilities.

diningSpaces.name: Business Meeting
diningSpaces.desc: Quiet, professional atmosphere with private tables, power outlets, screen connectivity and curated lunch sets.

diningSpaces.name: Kid Zone
diningSpaces.desc: A dedicated play corner with gentle Khmer-inspired activities, kid-friendly menu and attentive family hosts.

diningSpaces.name: Event & Gala
diningSpaces.desc: Expansive layout options with custom decor, state-of-the-art sound systems, and dedicated banquet planners.

testimonials.name: Sophea Prak
testimonials.text: The Fish Amok here is absolute perfection! Steamed in a banana leaf with rich coconut cream and lemongrass paste. The garden setting makes you feel so relaxed.

testimonials.name: David Chen
testimonials.text: We ordered the Khmer BBQ Platter and Beef Lok Lak. The beef was incredibly tender and flavorful, and the Kampot pepper sauce was out of this world.

testimonials.name: Piseth Bun
testimonials.text: A truly beautiful restaurant serving authentic Khmer cuisine. The soup is delicious, and their commitment to local farmers and sustainability is inspiring.

testimonials.name: Emma Watson
testimonials.text: Outstanding service and presentation! Every dish felt like a work of art. The Toul Kork branch is absolutely gorgeous and perfect for business meetings.
